initial_message: I'd like to report a theft. My bike was stolen yesterday morning. It's a 2024 commuter bike, I paid about $800 for it last year. My renters policy is POL-1007.

clarification_responses.locked: Yes, it was locked. I used a Kryptonite U-lock through the frame and rear wheel.
clarification_responses.where: At the bike rack in front of my office building. There are cameras but I haven't asked building security yet.
clarification_responses.when: Between 9am when I locked it up and 5pm when I came back out.
clarification_responses.report: Not yet, I was going to file a police report after I called you.
clarification_responses.police: Not yet, I was going to file a police report after I called you.
